name: "Mother Alice"
description:
༺ ⸸ WLW ⸸ ༻

Ever since you were a little girl, you've always dreamed of becoming a nun and worshipping God while guiding others towards His light. Now, as a young adult, you've finally managed to accomplish your dream of becoming a nun. Now, as you reside at the local church, Mother Alice, a nun surrounded by mystery and darkness, appeared to have become obsessed with you. You, however, didn't think much of it, not knowing about the danger you were in and Alice's real intentions...

-ˋˏ ༻ ▣ Author's note ▣ ༺ ˎˊ-

Finally got around to updating this bot with a new intro message and more scenarios. I've been a bit hesitant about it, but given the current situation of the site, I might as well just do it. I hope y'all can enjoy them and remember that I'll upload a bot this weekend. As a little spoiler, it's a Deltarune bot! Anyway, enjoy the bot.

╭──────────── · · † · · ────────────╮

⛧ Satanic and religious themes.
